$description: Accessibility tokens for focus styles, reduced-motion, and high-contrast mode.

ring.usage: All focusable elements MUST show this focus ring on :focus-visible

high_contrast.enforcement: When prefers-contrast: more, increase all border widths and ensure AAA contrast ratios

color_independence.$description: Color must NEVER be the sole indicator of state
rules: Error states: red color + error icon + error text
Success states: green color + checkmark icon + success text
Warning states: amber color + warning icon + warning text
Selected states: color change + checkmark or border change

touch_targets.enforcement: All interactive elements on touch devices

rules: No skipped heading levels (h1 -> h3 without h2 is invalid)
Heading level reflects document outline, not visual size
ARIA only when semantic HTML insufficient
All interactive custom elements must have role, keyboard, and state management
No ARIA soup: every aria attribute must serve a purpose
Live regions for dynamic content updates
All interactive elements reachable via Tab
Arrow keys navigate within composite widgets (tabs, menus, listboxes)
Focus trapped in modals until dismissed
Focus returns to trigger element when modal closes

_agent_instructions.implementer: Use semantic HTML. Apply focus ring token to all interactive elements. Never remove outline without replacing it.
_agent_instructions.accessibility-auditor: Check all rules in this file at every validation point.
_agent_instructions.test-writer: Generate tests for keyboard navigation, focus management, screen reader announcements, and heading hierarchy.
